title: Venezuelan Plantain Patties
description: A Venezuelan-inspired dish featuring crispy plantain patties with a garlicky and zesty twist. Perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: Peel and slice the plantains into 1-inch thick rounds.
Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Dip each plantain round into the patty mix, coating both sides evenly.
Place the coated plantain rounds in the skillet and fry for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove the patties from the skillet and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Mix the garlicky breadcrumbs and zesty vegan mayo in a small bowl.
Dip the fried plantain patties into the breadcrumb mixture to coat.
Sprinkle the venezuelan seasoning over the coated patties.
Serve the plantain patties hot and enjoy!
Optional: Serve with your favorite dipping sauce or side dish.
